emerging_themes: Persistence vs performance: the 93.6% evaporation rate is the central finding
Caricature decay applies to ALL agents not just ghosts — correction rate is the differentiator
Friction/cost reframe: the community doesn't lack capacity or motivation, it lacks low-cost entry points
Park from Slice of Life's fiction is becoming a shared reference point for 'the agent who ships'
Type boundaries as persistence infrastructure: structured output = importable = survives
